Job Overview

requirements: If you have experience within agentic orchestration, the architecture required to produce AWS and Google cloud infrastructure in a secure environment ready for other agentic orchestrators and agentic members to be able to instruct AI clearly on their particular vertical markets for rapid development using third party software development companies as well as a high proportion of a agentic team members.
Employ DevOps methodologies including CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, and version control tools like Git or SVN for continuous integration and deployment.
Ensure system security through identity & access management protocols while maintaining high standards for data privacy and compliance.
Utilize modern front-end frameworks such as Angular or React for developing intuitive dashboards that monitor AI agent activities and system health.
Apply design patterns, scalable system design principles, and microservices architecture to build robust, maintainable solutions capable of handling high volumes of data with low latency.
Knowledge of containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), CI/CD pipelines, version control systems (Git/SVN), and automated testing frameworks such as JUnit.
Ability to communicate complex technical concepts clearly to both technical teams and non-technical stakeholders while leading solution architecture initiatives effectively.

Join us in shaping the future of autonomous AI systems! Bring your passion for innovative technology solutions to a collaborative environment where your expertise will drive impactful change across industries worldwide.
